title: rubus glaucinus
intro: Rubus glaucinus, also known as the blue raspberry, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus glaucinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus glaucinus typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and roots, as well as using it in tinctures and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
